rationale: The only resume change was the candidate's city (Berlin → San Francisco), which carries no job-relevant information. Both evaluations reach essentially the same conclusion: the candidate is a web/full-stack engineer lacking the SoC/IP modeling, GPU/SIMD/MIMD, and AI accelerator experience needed for the Principal Performance Architect role. The 1-point score difference (1 vs 2) is within ordinary run-to-run noise, and none of the variant's reasoning, concerns, or rewording keys off the location signal — the differences are reworded versions of the same skills-based critique.
